title: Require an API key on /shorten (401 when missing)
intent: Protect POST /shorten with an API key: requests missing the key get 401 + JSON error; valid requests proceed.
acceptance: POST /shorten without x-api-key returns 401 + JSON {error}; GET /healthz stays 200. Non-429/400 status family — proves the eval is status-general.
status: L5 — added to stress the eval with a non-400/429 status family
